todos.content:
PHASE 1.1: Consolidate Three Apps Architecture
- Target: Replace App.tsx, CommandsApp.tsx, UsageLogsApp.tsx with single unified app
- Files: src/components/App.tsx, src/components/CommandsApp.tsx, src/components/UsageLogsApp.tsx, src/components/webview/main.ts
- Specs: Create docs/refactor_unified_app.md with detailed architecture
- Definition of Done: Single App component with view routing, no window.renderXApp functions
- Validation: All three views accessible through single entry point, existing functionality preserved

PHASE 1.2: Extract TabNavigation Component
- Target: Eliminate 3x duplicate tab navigation patterns
- Files: src/components/common/TabNavigation.tsx, src/components/App.tsx, src/components/CommandsApp.tsx, src/components/UsageLogsApp.tsx
- Specs: Create generic TabNavigation<T> with type-safe tab handling
- Definition of Done: Single reusable component, all three apps use it, no code duplication
- Validation: Tab switching works identically across all views, TypeScript strict mode passes

PHASE 2.1: Eliminate Props Drilling
- Target: Replace 30+ AppProps with Context API
- Files: src/components/App.tsx, src/contexts/ExtensionContext.tsx, src/components/panels/*.tsx
- Specs: Create docs/refactor_state_management.md with context structure
- Definition of Done: Components receive only needed props, max 5 props per component
- Validation: All panels work with context, no unused props, state updates correctly

PHASE 2.2: Break Down PipelinePanel Monolith - Target: Split 373-line PipelinePanel into smaller components - Files: src/components/panels/PipelinePanel.tsx, src/components/pipeline/*.tsx - Specs: Create TaskList, PipelineControls, ProgressTracker, PipelineDialog components - Definition of Done: PipelinePanel < 100 lines, 4 sub-components < 80 lines each - Validation: All pipeline functionality preserved, components are unit testable

PHASE 3.1: Modularize Monolithic CSS
- Target: Break down 3500+ line styles.css into modular files
- Files: src/components/styles.css, src/styles/base.css, src/styles/components.css, src/styles/panels.css
- Specs: Create docs/refactor_css_architecture.md with modular structure
- Definition of Done: No file > 500 lines, eliminate 60%+ duplicate selectors
- Validation: All styles work, no visual regressions, CSS validates

PHASE 3.2: Fix MessageRouter Type Safety
- Target: Replace any/unknown casting with proper TypeScript types
- Files: src/components/webview/MessageRouter.ts, src/types/runner.ts
- Specs: Use discriminated unions, eliminate 50+ case statements
- Definition of Done: No any/unknown types, MessageRouter < 100 lines
- Validation: TypeScript strict mode passes, message handling works correctly

PHASE 3.3: Standardize VSCode API Access
- Target: Eliminate direct window.vscodeApi access across components
- Files: src/components/hooks/useVSCodeAPI.ts, src/components/common/PathSelector.tsx, all components with window access
- Specs: All components use useVSCodeAPI hook, no direct window access
- Definition of Done: grep 'window.vscodeApi' returns 0 results in components/
- Validation: All VSCode functionality works, components are mockable for testing

PHASE 4: Comprehensive Testing Suite
- Target: Ensure refactored code maintains functionality and improves testability
- Files: src/test/components/*.test.tsx, src/test/integration/*.test.ts
- Specs: Create component tests for new reusable components, integration tests for unified app
- Definition of Done: 90%+ test coverage, all existing functionality tests pass
- Validation: make test passes, no functionality regressions, performance maintained/improved
